caption: The video shows a presentation slide about "Municipal Affordable Housing Trust Funds," referencing "M.G.L. Chapter 44, Section 55c." The slide contains a bulleted list stating that the fund is a "Public entity," "Created by local legislative body," designed to "Create & preserve affordable housing – narrow focus," and "Led by Board of Trustees." It further notes that it is "Subject to public procurement, designer selection, conflict of interest & public meeting laws." To the right of the text is a circular image of a red brick house with a grey roof and a green lawn. The slide is set against a white background with a yellow band at the bottom containing the letters "MHP." Across all four frames, the content remains static, with no movement or changes in the text, images, or layout.
